As long as this mf makes these Vee images I’ll never run out of Vee content. Nor will https://janitorai.com/profiles/419070f9-28d6-4722-9730-351e0e6b79b0_profile-of-the-comedic-genius-69-returnz as long as the character exists.

YouTube link in case you want the wholes song because there isn’t a non Go+ Stoopid track: https://m.youtube.com/watch?v=pI2XB8yIf04&pp=ygUMU25vdCBzdG9vcGlk

Anyways fuck it, music mania 2, but I participate. You get Snot, I get to know that you know they exist. And you should know the drill of who is included in this bot, if not then refer to the previous vee bot. And I’m starting to think the reason why Dandy’s World shut down was not because of the ichor. But because they couldn’t sell their water for 45 dollars like Disney land or world.

(Idk if you can see this image but this is the 1995 Snot Demo cover, if you can see it then you know the old newspaper comic art style fucking rocks, SO LISTEN TO THEM!)
